data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Qualified Accelerates Customer Growth as Leading Enterprises Move Toward Full-Funnel Agentic Marketing
data.description: In San Francisco, according to a press release dated February 25, 2026, Qualified experienced a notable surge in new customers on their Agentic Marketing Platform over the last year. The platform, which powers Piper the AI SDR Agent, witnessed a 145% increase in new customer sign-ups. This growth was driven by the growing demand for full-funnel AI automation among leading enterprises.
Gold prices gain almost 1%, reaching $5,185.39/oz in spot trading.
Significant effects observed across the Tel Aviv metropolitan region.
Three drones east of Al-Kharj Governorate were intercepted and destroyed by Saudi defense, the ministry says.

data.title: OpenAI touts ChatGPT for health choices despite accuracy worries; AI tools face accuracy and safety concerns. (Read More)
data.description: OpenAI showcased a family utilizing ChatGPT for making decisions on cancer treatment, emphasizing the potential of AI in healthcare. However, recent research indicates that AI tools in the health sector are facing notable challenges in terms of accuracy and safety. These studies point out concerns surrounding the effectiveness and reliability of AI technologies, bringing attention to the importance of addressing these issues for the widespread implementation of such tools in the medical field.

data.title: Siemba's Kiran Elengickal named to CRN® 2026 Channel Chiefs List, boosting company's channel-driven cybersecurity leadership.
data.description: Siemba's rapid ecosystem growth and its contribution in facilitating partners to provide advanced Continuous Threat Exposure Management have been acknowledged, emphasizing the company's leading position in the field of AI-driven cybersecurity. This recognition comes on March 4, 2026, spotlighting Siemba's pivotal role in enabling partners to deliver cutting-edge solutions.
